name: tv.tootie/unraid-mcp
title: Unraid MCP
description: Read-only MCP server for Unraid homelab servers — query array health, Docker containers, VMs, metrics, and more via the Unraid GraphQL API.

environmentVariables.name: UNRAID_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of your Unraid GraphQL endpoint (e.g. https://tower.local/graphql).

environmentVariables.name: UNRAID_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key for the Unraid GraphQL API (x-api-key header).

environmentVariables.name: UNRAID_MCP_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Bearer token for authenticating MCP endpoint requests.

environmentVariables.name: UNRAID_API_SKIP_TLS_VERIFY
environmentVariables.description: Skip TLS certificate verification when connecting to Unraid (default: false). Set to true for self-signed certs.
